message:
style(test): rustfmt reformat scrub/golden helpers in golden_robot_json.rs

Pure rustfmt adjustment — the timestamp and UUID regex builders, and
the `std::fs::create_dir_all` call in `assert_golden`, are reformatted
to rustfmt's preferred single-line form. No semantic change; the
regexes, replacement strings, and error messages are identical to the
prior code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
